jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at FabHotels
jsonLd.description:
FabHotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!
